hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const p=path.join(process.cwd(),'.harness','progress.md');if(fs.existsSync(p)){const now=new Date().toISOString();let txt=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');txt=txt.replace(/
## Last commit
.*$/ms,'')+'
## Last commit
- '+now;fs.writeFileSync(p,txt);}"

PostToolUse.description: Update .harness/progress.md with timestamp after git commits
